title: Add flaky-test mitigation for engine-cli inspect-summary timeout
summary: Companion to QA-2026-05-20-004. The 'prints a stable inspect summary' test in tests/unit/engine-cli.test.ts spawns a subprocess whose startup latency occasionally exceeds the 5000ms vitest default. Fix options: bump the per-test timeout, pre-warm the subprocess, or split the filesystem fixture setup from the subprocess invocation. No clean .playtest.json reproducer — this requires unit-test-level mitigation.
repro: Run: npx vitest run tests/unit/engine-cli.test.ts in a loop
Observe: timeout on 'prints a stable inspect summary' roughly 1-in-3 runs
